_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.5 the NpcVsPlayerCalc.dps path (the full NPC-vs-player / damage-taken calc: getPlayerDefenceRoll + getNPCMaxHit + getNPCMaxAttackRoll + getHitChance + getDistribution + getDps + getAverageDamageTaken) is ported in addition to all the v0.1.4 PlayerVsNpcCalc paths. The kind:"nvp" corpus rows assert playerDefRoll/npcMaxHit/npcMaxAttackRoll (integer exact) and npcAccuracy/npcDps/avgDmgTaken (relative <= 1e-9) via NpcVsPlayerCalc; the kind:"pvn" (default) rows are unchanged.
